(Azur Lane OC)

Discord: https://discord.gg/rbq2xquB3g

Did you know that Azur Lane actually has a canon commander...kinda? His name is John Archer and is mentioned in the Operation: Siren files. He is supposed to be the Captain of the USS Enterprise (CVN-65) in a different timeline.

Also, I made it so that the Commander isn't the Commander of the all of the Eagle Union but just a small region of operations within it.
creator: Ailenus
